# Mini Version FishCraft
 • version for the weak PC
 
 • 80+ mods
    
 • Optimization Sodium + addons main
 
 • The assembly is designed for weak PCs, there is a separate version for more powerful ones
   [[FULL] FishCraft 1.0.0 ](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fishcraft-2-season)
   
## Author/Co.Author
 • WhiteMeovv - Author
 
 • miss_kristallik - Co.author

 ## INFO
 • Allocate 2 to 4 RAM to the game
 
 • Mod "Nvidium" is disabled by default. To turn it on, switch the appropriate lever in the list of launcher mods. (ONLY FOR NVIDIA 16x Series OWNERS)
